title: VideoTranscript
description: Per-video transcript with diarization, timestamps, nonverbal events, inferred emotions, and screenshare events.

video_id.description: Matches the video_id in the corresponding metadata.json.

utterances.description: Ordered list of speech utterances. Overlapping utterances are represented as separate records with overlapping time ranges.

screenshare_segments.description: Top-level list of screenshare on/off segments, separate from utterance-level events. Allows screenshare state to be queried independently of speech.

warnings.description: Pipeline-level warnings (e.g. audio dropout, diarization failures, low-confidence regions).

speaker_id.description: Stable speaker label assigned by diarization (e.g. 'Speaker_1'). Maps to participant_id in metadata.

speaker_display_name.description: Human-readable name from webcam tile label, if identified.

start_time.description: Utterance start time in seconds from video start.

end_time.description: Utterance end time in seconds from video start.

text.description: ASR transcript of the utterance. Empty string if no speech detected.

asr_confidence.description: Average ASR log-probability for this utterance (Whisper avg_logprob; negative values are normal). Null if not available.

nonverbal_events.description: Nonverbal actions detected during this utterance window.

inferred_emotions.description: Inferred emotional states during this utterance. Conservative: only populated when evidence is clear.

screenshare_events.description: Screenshare state changes that occur during this utterance window.

overlaps_with.description: List of utterance_ids that overlap in time with this utterance. Empty if no overlap.

timestamp.description: Time in seconds when the event was detected.

duration_seconds.description: Estimated duration of the event. Null if instantaneous or not determinable.

notes.description: Optional free-text description of the event.

emotion.description: Inferred emotional state. Conservative vocabulary — only high-signal states included.

confidence.description: Model confidence. Emotions below threshold in .env are suppressed.

evidence_type.description: What signal was used to infer the emotion.

timestamp.description: Time in seconds when the event occurred.

shared_by.description: participant_id of who initiated the share, if determinable.

content_type.description: Coarse classification of what is being shared.

platform_name.description: Specific platform identified (e.g. 'saga', 'desmos'). Null if not identifiable.

start_time.description: Time in seconds when screenshare became active.

end_time.description: Time in seconds when screenshare stopped. Null if still active at end of video.

shared_by.description: participant_id of the sharer, if determinable.
